{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = spiritual sight
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Spiritual sight]] can be blinded by certain auras.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
